title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF INFANTA EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF INFANTA, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, TO CLARO M. RECTO MEMORIAL HOSPITAL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 8824 / 66 OG No. 21, 5192-16 (May 25, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4292, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF INFANTA EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF INFANTA, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, TO CLARO M. RECTO MEMORIAL HOSPITAL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Infanta Emergency Hospital in the Municipality of Infanta, Province of Quezon, is hereby changed to Claro M. Recto Memorial Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
